attributes.title: [SOC] Navigation Grid
attributes.visState:
{"title": "[SOC] Navigation Grid", "type": "markdown", "params": {"markdown": "# 🛰️ Suburban-SOC — Home

Central navigation for the four-dashboard monitoring ecosystem.

| Dashboard | Focus |
|---|---|
| [1️⃣ Executive / Bird's-Eye](/app/dashboards#/view/executive-dashboard) | KPIs, NIST, MITRE, SOAR |
| [2️⃣ Network & Traffic](/app/dashboards#/view/network-dashboard-v3) | Volume, DNS, HTTP, TLS, GeoIP |
| [3️⃣ Endpoint & Host-Level](/app/dashboards#/view/endpoint-dashboard) | Processes, auth, Sigma |
| [4️⃣ Data Quality & Ingestion](/app/dashboards#/view/dataquality-dashboard) | Pipeline health |
", "fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": true}, "aggs": []}
